quote.text: To understand everything is to forgive everything. Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
quote.author: The Elder

features.title: Timeless Wisdom, Modern Form
features.description: Combining ancient Buddhist philosophy with advanced AI to guide you through life's complexities.

mindfulDialogue.title: Mindful Dialogue
mindfulDialogue.description: Engage in deep, meaningful conversations. The Elder listens without judgment and responds with profound insight.

eternalMemory.title: Eternal Memory
eternalMemory.description: Your journey is remembered. The system evolves with you, recalling past conversations to provide continuity.

emotionalResonance.title: Emotional Resonance
emotionalResonance.description: More than just data. Experience interactions that understand nuance, emotion, and the human condition.

nightlyReflection.title: Nightly Reflection
nightlyReflection.description: End your day with guided contemplation. Review your thoughts and find peace before rest.

breathAndSpace.title: Breath & Space
breathAndSpace.description: An interface designed to help you slow down. No clutter, no noise—just space for your thoughts.

dailyAwakening.title: Daily Awakening
dailyAwakening.description: Start each morning with a gentle koan or thought to center your mind for the day ahead.

1.title: Begin the Journey
1.description: Sign in to create your sacred space. Your privacy is paramount; your thoughts are secure.

2.title: Share Your Burden
2.description: Speak freely about your anxieties, questions, or day. The Elder is always present to listen.

3.title: Receive Wisdom
3.description: Gain new perspectives through gentle guidance, helping you find the answers within yourself.

cta.title: Ready to find your
cta.description: Join thousands of others who have found clarity and calm through the wisdom of Formless.

metadata.title: Formless — AI Wisdom Companion
metadata.description: A wise AI companion guided by Buddhist philosophy. Find clarity through thoughtful conversations with an elder who remembers your journey.

chat.title: Formless Chat
chat.subtitle: A patient AI elder guided by Buddhist wisdom
chat.quote: "All forms are transient; return to inner clarity."
chat.prompt: What would you like to talk about?

anxious.label: Feeling anxious
anxious.value: I have been feeling anxious lately and want to talk.

work.label: Work pressure
work.value: Work has been heavy and I feel exhausted.

relationship.label: Relationship worries
relationship.value: I feel confused about a relationship.

calm.label: Quiet my mind
calm.value: I want a way to calm my mind.

chat.streamingStatus: The elder is writing a response.

history.title: Conversation History
history.emptySubtitle: Start a new chat to begin your reflection.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account preferences and experience
settings.accountSubtitle: View and manage your account details

letters.title: Slow Correspondence
letters.subtitle: One thoughtful reply at a time. Up to three letters per day.
letters.alternateHint: Letters alternate between you and the recipient.
letters.howItWorks1: One letter, one reply. No overlap.
letters.howItWorks2: Up to three letters per day for a calm pace.
letters.howItWorks3: Each thread lives as its own archive.
letters.emptyInbox: No letters yet. Start with a thoughtful note.
letters.replyPlaceholderWaiting: Waiting for a reply before you can write again.
letters.replyHint: You can only reply when it is your turn.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

legal.privacyBody: We respect your privacy. This page summarizes how Formless handles your data. For full details, contact the team through your account settings.
legal.termsBody: By using Formless, you agree to use the service thoughtfully and lawfully. For questions, reach out via the contact options in settings.
